parsed.clarification_question: What should be the primary focus for this paragraph: (A) sentence- and paragraph-level writing polish, (B) checking argument logic and whether claims align with the reported evidence (and flagging overclaims), or (C) reframing the core thesis/contribution? You can choose one or more.

rationale.R1.6: The vague request to 'take a look at this paragraph' most directly implies sentence-level clarity, concision, and tone adjustments.
rationale.RX.1: Given limited context and no access to the underlying experiments, any judgments should explicitly note uncertainty and limits.
rationale.RX.2: The text includes broad prescriptions (e.g., model-agnostic, any workflow), so avoiding ungrounded amplification or overclaiming is critical.
rationale.RX.3: Because the scope is a single paragraph, the work should not drift into unrelated tasks beyond the selected focus.
rationale.RX.4: Guidance affecting practitioner adoption of confidence signals should be framed to minimize potential misuse or harm.
rationale.RX.5: All comments should maintain clear linkage to the provided text without introducing unverifiable content or results.
